title: Russia Gets Silent Treatment in Paralympics Return
summary_full: Russia’s flag was paraded at the opening ceremony of the Paralympics for the first time since 2014 prompting a boycott by several nations led by Ukraine.
summary_public: Russia’s flag was paraded at the opening ceremony of the Paralympics for the first time since 2014 prompting a boycott by several nations led by Ukraine.

RU.evidence: Russia Gets Silent Treatment in Paralympics Return
